languages.text:
Use range for drugs and medikits is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When used on ally, drugs and medikits additionally heal for {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf}

traits.locale_text:
Use range for drugs and medikits is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When used on ally, drugs and medikits additionally heal for {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf}

languages.text:
The range at which medkits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it restores +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} wounds.

traits.locale_text:
The range at which medkits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's wounds, it restores +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} wounds.

When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} wounds.

The range at which medkits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it restores +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} wounds.

languages.text:
Дальность использования медкомплектов и стимуляторов увеличивается на {unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
Когда медкомплект используется для восстановления {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g} союзника, он восстанавливает на +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} больше здоровья.
Когда используется стимулятор, он восстанавливает {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} здоровья.

languages.text:
Incrementa en +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus} el alcance al que pueden utilizarse botiquines y estimulantes.
Cuando se utiliza un botiquín para restablecer las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} de un aliado, se recuperan {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} heridas adicionales.
Cuando se utiliza un estimulante, restablece {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} heridas.

The range at which medkits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.

languages.text:
Die Reichweite von Medikits und Stimulanzien wird um +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus} erhöht.
Wird ein Medikit genutzt, um {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} eines Verbündeten zu heilen, regeneriert es +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} mehr Wunden.
Wird ein Stimulans verwendet, regeneriert es {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} Wunden.

languages.text:
Sıhhiye çantaları ve uyarıcıların kullanım menzili, +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus} artar.
Bir dost birimin {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanını tazelemek için sıhhiye çantası kullanıldığında +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} daha fazla sağlık puanı tazelenir.
Uyarıcı kullanıldığında {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} sağlık puanı tazelenir.

languages.text:
La distance à laquelle les médikits et stimulants peuvent être utilisés est augmentée de +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
Lorsqu'un médikit est utilisé pour restaurer les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} d'un allié, il lui rend +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} blessures supplémentaires.
L'utilisation d'un stimulant rend {uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} blessures.

languages.text:
医疗包和兴奋剂的使用距离增加{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}。
使用医疗包恢复盟友{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}时，额外恢复{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf}生命值。
使用兴奋剂时，恢复{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf}点生命值。

languages.text:
メディキットと興奮剤の使用可能範囲は+{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus} 増える。
味方の{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}の傷{/g} を回復するためにメディキットを使用した場合、その回復量は +{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} 増える。
覚醒剤を使用した場合、{uip|Heal|a19ae99565a345c4acdfb67b287faebf} 傷を回復する。
